signOut.errorBody: Couldn't sign you out. Try again.

page.title: Practice
page.subtitle: Identity, brand, contact, services, and states

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Practice name and public slug used in the workspace URL.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Avatar and accent color used throughout the widget.
brand.avatarDescription: A square image, up to 5 MB.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.description: Website, business email, and phone for this practice.

address.title: Address
address.description: Shown in public practice details and intake flows.
address.helper: Leave fields blank to clear them.

services.title: Services
services.description: Choose the legal service areas this practice accepts.

servicesByState.empty: No states yet. Add a state to assign services.

practiceSettingsSaveFailed.title: Couldn't save settings
practiceSettingsSaveFailed.body: Couldn't save your practice settings. Try again.

logoUploadFailed.title: Logo upload failed
logoUploadFailed.body: Couldn't upload your logo. Try again.

spokenLanguage.label: Spoken language
spokenLanguage.description: Pick the language you mostly speak. If yours isn't listed, auto-detect may still work.

apps.title: Apps
apps.description: Connect third-party services to fit your workflow.

copySnippetSuccess.title: Code copied
copySnippetSuccess.body: The widget snippet is on your clipboard.

copySnippetError.title: Couldn't copy
copySnippetError.body: Couldn't copy to clipboard. Select the widget snippet manually.

clio.name: Clio
clio.description: Connect Clio to sync matters, contacts, and calendar events.

connectModal.title: Connect {{app}}
connectModal.description: Review what {{app}} can access before continuing.

permissions.title: Permissions are always respected
permissions.description: {{app}} is limited to permissions you've set. Revoke access anytime.

control.title: You're in control
control.description: {{app}} respects your training-data preferences. Data from {{app}} may be used to give you relevant information.

risk.title: Connectors carry some risk
risk.description: Connectors are built to respect your privacy, but sites may try to misuse your data.

auth.securityNote: For extra security, enable multi-factor authentication on your Google account, or

error.title: Connection error
error.body: Couldn't connect to Clio. Try again.

messenger.missingSlugWarning: Workspace slug missing. Check your practice settings.

integrationGuide.title: Integration guide
integrationGuide.description: Copy the snippet below and paste it into the <0><head></0> or just before the closing <1></body></1> tag of your website.

plan.thanksForSubscribing: Thanks for subscribing to Blawby Business. Your plan includes:

cancel.description: Your subscription cancels immediately. You'll lose access to premium features. This can't be undone.

highest.title: Account
highest.body: You're already on the highest tier.

cartSaveError.title: Cart error
cartSaveError.body: Couldn't save cart data. Trying another way.

planNotFound.title: Plan not found
planNotFound.body: Couldn't find that plan. Try again or contact support.

planDataMissing.title: Plan setup error
planDataMissing.body: That plan is missing payment info. Contact support.

payments.description: Manage billing details and invoices in Stripe.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Manage external payout accounts and submit verification details.

linkedInUnavailableToast.title: LinkedIn is not available yet
linkedInUnavailableToast.body: This connect flow has not been implemented in Blawby yet.

gitHubUnavailableToast.title: GitHub is not available yet
gitHubUnavailableToast.body: This connect flow has not been implemented in Blawby yet.

domainErrors.spaces: Domains can't have leading or trailing spaces.
domainErrors.format: Use a valid domain format, like example.com.

email.title: Email
email.oauthGatingExplanation: Your account was created with Google, Microsoft, or Apple. To change your email, add a password in Settings, then Security, then Password.

changeSuccess.title: Check your email
changeSuccess.body: We sent instructions to confirm your new email.

delete.heading: Delete your account?
delete.description: This can't be undone. All your data, conversations, and settings will be deleted.
listItems: All your conversations and chat history
delete.errorMismatch: Type your email exactly as shown to confirm.
delete.errorFailed: Couldn't delete your account. Try again.
delete.toastFailedBody: Couldn't delete your account. Try again.
delete.verificationSentBody: Check your email and click the confirmation link to finish deletion.
delete.checkYourEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link to finish the deletion.

notifications.title: Notifications

desktop.title: Desktop notifications
desktop.description: Allow Blawby to send OS-level alerts.
desktop.permissionGrantedBody: You'll get desktop alerts when Blawby sends updates.
desktop.permissionDeniedBody: Enable notifications in your browser settings to get alerts.

notifications.systemRequiredHint: System notifications are required for all members.

organization.title: Organization defaults
organization.description: Set defaults for your team. Members can customize unless a channel is locked.
organization.systemRequired: System notifications are required and can't be turned off.

inApp.frequencyDescription: Show a single summary message for the Blawby System conversation.

payments.title: Payments (in-app)
payments.description: Payment and billing updates in chat.

password.description: Change your password, or reset it if you've forgotten it.
password.addDescription: Add a password so you can make sensitive account changes after signing in with Google, Microsoft, or Apple.

errorEmailUnavailable.add: Can't add a password because your email is unavailable.
errorEmailUnavailable.reset: Can't reset your password because your email is unavailable.

mismatch.title: Password mismatch
mismatch.body: New password and confirmation don't match.

reset.title: Reset email sent
reset.body: Check your email for reset instructions.

mfa.title: Multi-factor authentication
mfa.description: Adds a security challenge at sign-in. If you can't pass it, you can recover your account by email.

disable.heading: Turn off MFA?
disable.description: Turning off MFA makes your account less secure. You won't need a second factor when signing in.

trustedDevices.title: Trusted devices
trustedDevices.description: When you sign in on another device, it shows up here. It can get device prompts for future sign-ins.

current.title: Log out of this device
current.toastBody: You're logged out of this device.

all.title: Log out of all devices
all.description: Logs out all active sessions, including this one. Other devices may take up to 30 minutes.
all.toastBody: You're logged out of all devices.

mfa.title: Secure your account
mfa.instructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the code below.

codeRequired.title: Code required
codeRequired.body: Enter the verification code from your authenticator app.

configurationError.title: MFA not configured
configurationError.body: Multi-factor authentication isn't set up on this account. Contact support or check your account settings.

clipboardUnsupported.title: Clipboard not supported
clipboardUnsupported.body: Your browser doesn't support copying. Copy the code manually.

helpCenter.ariaLabel: Visit Blawby help, opens in a new tab

terms.title: Terms and policies
terms.description: Read our terms of service and privacy policy.
terms.ariaLabel: Read terms and policies, opens in a new tab

bug.title: Report a bug
bug.description: Help us improve by reporting issues.
